title: helianthemum oelandicum var. alpestre
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum var. alpestre, also known as Alp Rose or Alpine Rockrose, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Helianthemum genus. This shrubby perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as possessing antiseptic properties to treat minor cuts and scrapes. Helianthemum oelandicum var. alpestre can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
